keyEvents.text: Goal!  Antigua and Barbuda 0, Bahamas 1. Nathan Wells (Bahamas) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ricardo McPhee   following a set piece situation.
Nathan Wells (Bahamas) is shown the yellow card.
First Half ends, Antigua and Barbuda 0, Bahamas 1.
Substitution, Bahamas. William Gardiner replaces Alexiou Cartwright.
Goal!  Antigua and Barbuda 1, Bahamas 1. Josh Parker (Antigua and Barbuda) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by TJ Bramble.
Goal!  Antigua and Barbuda 2, Bahamas 1. TJ Bramble (Antigua and Barbuda) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Josh Parker.
Substitution, Bahamas. Nicolás López replaces Omari Bain because of an injury.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. D'Andre Bishop replaces Dion Pereira.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Junior Benjamin replaces Javorn Stevens.
William Bayles (Bahamas) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Bahamas. Nahum Johnson replaces Nathan Wells.
Zafique Drew (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Antigua and Barbuda 2, Bahamas 2. Nahum Johnson (Bahamas) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Kendukar Challenger replaces TJ Bramble.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Shavorn Philip replaces Zafique Drew.
Second Half ends, Antigua and Barbuda 2, Bahamas 2.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.
Attempt missed. Marcel Joseph (Bahamas) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Alexiou Cartwright with a cross.
